name: PENDRED SYNDROME
definition: autosomal recessive disorder of chromosome 7 characterized by dyshormonogenic goiter
distribution: absence of interscalar septum of modiolus (= central bony spiral of cochlea) in 20-75%;
discriminating_features: absence of interscalar septum of modiolus (= central bony spiral of cochlea) in 20-75%;

general: absence of interscalar septum of modiolus (= central bony spiral of cochlea) in 20-75%;
